intro: Obione longitrichoma, also known as Peruvian glasswort, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may help to alleviate conditions like wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Obione longitrichoma include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Obione longitrichoma is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to treat skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
